entries.feature: Default application shell, module navigation, CLI modes, and lifecycle
entries.notes: The default app is zero-CGO gogpu/ui and no longer routes through the legacy Fyne tab lifecycle.

entries.feature: Documentation screenshots and demo frame capture
entries.notes: The gogpu screenshotter captures real app frames without Xvfb, OpenGL Fyne capture, or window-manager dependencies.

entries.feature: Legacy visual crawler and recording helpers
entries.notes: Static screenshot capture is covered by gogpu. Runtime recording and crawler-style interactive assertions still need an explicit gogpu replacement or a decision to retire them.

entries.feature: P-E loop workspace, material controls, calibration, PUND/FORC, literature overlays, export dialogs, and custom hysteresis widgets
entries.notes: Core material selection and P-E loop state exist in gogpu. PUND, FORC, calibration dialogs, literature overlays, export workflows, and several educational widgets need explicit gogpu parity or a better replacement.

entries.feature: Crossbar array controls, MVM heatmaps, IR drop, sneak paths, drift, FeCap/3D stack tabs, live slides, and comparison widgets
entries.notes: Core array size, MVM, IR toggle, and heatmap rendering exist in gogpu. Dedicated non-ideality tabs, live-slide flow, comparison widgets, and export validation need parity decisions.

entries.feature: MNIST inference dashboard, dual-mode demo, accuracy sweep, energy and quantization widgets, activation/weight views, dialogs, and export
entries.notes: Core inference summary exists in gogpu. Dual-mode interactions, training/weight visualizations, detailed preprocessing, accuracy sweep controls, and export workflows need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Peripheral circuits workspace, unified array canvas, read/write/compute paths, ISPP, half-select stress, PVT, reference specs, comparison metrics, and overlays
entries.notes: Gogpu exposes circuit metrics, sections, and the unified control contract. The full interactive unified canvas, circuit path overlays, half-select/stress/PVT investigations, logs, reference-spec workflows, and detailed visual interactions need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Unified controls action contract for array size, operation mode, architecture, selected cell, write target, DAC/ADC/TIA, coupling tier, and ISPP engine
entries.notes: This ports the shared gogpu/viewmodel control vocabulary and state transitions. It does not claim parity for the animated circuit canvas, overlays, logs, or deep investigation panels tracked by the broader circuits gap entry.

entries.feature: Technology comparison, evidence model, scenario profiles, sensitivity analysis, market/fabrication reality panels, hero cards, and export
entries.notes: Canonical architecture comparison is ported. Scenario editing, sensitivity and market panels, fabrication reality messaging, and export need parity decisions.

entries.feature: EDA design suite, builder validation, export viewer, layout visualization, learning center, visual explainers, and layout canvas
entries.notes: Gogpu shows EDA summary, export formats, and representative generated text. The builder wizard, validation tab, layout viewer, learning center, and custom layout visuals need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Documentation viewer, navigation, search, glossary integration, layout, and persistence
entries.notes: Gogpu exposes documentation sections and trust-boundary content. Search, glossary integration, navigation state, and persistence need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Reusable legacy widgets, theme systems, keyboard help, and Fyne export helpers
entries.notes: Gogpu has design tokens plus plot and heatmap renderers. Shared Fyne widgets and theme affordances need a mapped gogpu design-system replacement, retirement decision, or module-specific reimplementation.
